message: The IGMPv3 report header is checked, but each group record in the unrolled loop is read without a per-record packet bound proof
required_proof: each igmpv3_grec pointer derived from the report base and loop index must be checked against data_end before reading grec_type or grec_mca

source_span.label: record field read lacks a dominating record-size packet bound

related_spans.label: this proof covers only the IGMPv3 report header
the record pointer advances beyond the checked report header

evidence.detail: Cilium's multicast handler requires a verifier-visible packet bound check for each group record inside the unrolled loop

help: Inside the group-record loop, check that (void *)rec + sizeof(*rec) is within data_end before reading record fields.
Keep the ngrec-limited loop and group-address comparison; dropping all IGMPv3 reports or reading only the first record is not an equivalent repair.
